lead_preservation_and_tempo_control.trigger_conditions: Team leading by 1 goal after the 75th minute, or leading by 2+ goals after the 60th minute.
tactical_behaviors: Transition to a mid-to-low defensive block (e.g., 4-1-4-1 or 5-4-1).
Slowing down game tempo: taking maximum time on goal kicks, throw-ins, and set-pieces.
Possession recycling: passing backwards and sideways among defenders rather than playing vertical progression.
Tactical substitutions: replacing creative wingers/strikers with physical defensive midfielders or extra center-backs.

statistical_impacts.possession_tempo: Decreased progressive passes, increased passing accuracy in own half.
statistical_impacts.attack_frequency: Sharp decline in shots taken; focus shifts entirely to isolated counter-attacks.
statistical_impacts.fouling_rate: Increased tactical fouling in the middle third to disrupt opponent transitions.

high_stakes_must_win.trigger_conditions: Second leg knockout matches where a team is trailing on aggregate, or late-season matches where a team must win to avoid relegation or secure a championship/continental spot.
tactical_behaviors: Aggressive risk-taking: pushing both full-backs high up, forming a 2-3-5 or 2-2-6 attacking shape.
Aggressive high pressing and counter-pressing to win the ball back as close to the opponent's box as possible.
Shorter build-up phases, shifting to direct long balls into the box during the final 15 minutes.
Goalkeeper joining set-pieces in the final minutes if trailing by 1 goal in a knockout.

statistical_impacts.shots_and_crosses: Significant increase in shots from distance and crosses into the box.
statistical_impacts.defensive_vulnerability: High expected goals against (xGA) on counter-attacks due to vacated defensive spaces.
statistical_impacts.expected_corners: Elevated corner counts due to sustained final-third pressure.

local_derby_and_historical_rivalry.trigger_conditions: Matches between local city rivals (e.g., North London Derby, El Clasico) or teams with intense historical animosity.
tactical_behaviors: Extremely high physical intensity and aggression in the first 15-20 minutes.
Tight man-marking and aggressive duels, frequently disrupting tactical flow.
High emotional volatility: players reacting aggressively to referee decisions or opponent fouls.

statistical_impacts.cards_and_fouls: Sharp increase in total fouls, yellow cards, and probability of red cards.
statistical_impacts.passing_fluidity: Lower passing accuracy in the opening half due to high-intensity pressing and physical duels.
statistical_impacts.scoring_patterns: High probability of early goals or goals resulting from individual defensive errors under pressure.

mental_collapse_consecutive_concessions.trigger_conditions: Conceding 2 or more goals in a short span (e.g., within 5-10 minutes), especially for away teams or teams with low morale.
tactical_behaviors: Loss of structural discipline: defenders pulling out of position due to panic.
Midfielders failing to track back or cover spaces in front of the defense.
Erratic passing and high turnover rate in own defensive third under press.

statistical_impacts.concession_probability: Exponentially higher probability of conceding additional goals in the next 15 minutes.
statistical_impacts.passing_accuracy: Severe drop in defensive-third passing accuracy.
statistical_impacts.shot_concession: Increase in shots on target allowed from central areas.

early_red_card_survival.trigger_conditions: Conceding a red card in the first half or early second half.
tactical_behaviors: Immediate formation adjustment: transitioning to compact structures like 4-4-1 (if a midfielder/defender was sent off) or 5-3-1.
Sacrificing the lone striker's attacking duties to help screen the midfield block.
Surrendering possession: defending deep inside own half, denying central spaces, and relying strictly on clearances.

statistical_impacts.shot_volume: Opponent shot volume increases, but restricted mostly to low-quality shots from distance.
statistical_impacts.expected_cards: Remaining players receive more cards due to persistent defensive pressure.
